corrections.note: Image shows smooth breathing on Ἀαρών and likely acute on final syllable; transcription has grave. If normalizing grave/acute by line position is not intended, this may be ignored.

corrections.current: ἐν τῷ ζηλῶσαι αὐτὸν ἐν φόβῳ Κυρίου
corrections.correct: ἐν τῷ ζηλῶσαι αὐτὸν ἐν φόβῳ Κυρίου
corrections.note: Printed Κυρίου appears with acute; transcription matches in substance. Included only if accent form is being checked strictly.
Apparatus prints ευδόκησεν A without rough breathing.
Apparatus has accents on ἐν πλησμονῇ.

corrections.current: Ἀαρων] αὐ- των ℵ αὐτῳ Δ
corrections.correct: Ἀαρων] αὐ- τῶν ℵ αὐτῷ Δ
corrections.note: Accents missing on τῶν and αὐτῷ in apparatus.

uncertain.note: Final accent in Ἀαρών may be acute in print while transcription has grave; not fully certain whether to treat grave/acute distinction here as an error.

notes: Body text appears substantively correct. Main clear issues are in apparatus accent/breathing details. Right-margin verse references and left parenthetical references are correctly handled and not body text.
